subject: [BUG] fuse: wb_wait_for_completion hang on suspend with fuse-overlayfs on tmpfs persists in 6.19.6 (AS_NO_DATA_INTEGRITY fix incomplete)

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified the root cause of the hang as a stuck fuse daemon unable to fully service ->write_inode() by wb_workfn. Requested further debugging and analysis.

2026-03-17.patch_summary: The patch author, Joanne Koong, reported a hang in fuse-overlayfs on tmpfs during suspend, which persists even after the AS_NO_DATA_INTEGRITY fix.
